Definition: DQ rule failure rate < 1%. Isolated records. No downstream impact.
Communication: Logged in Collibra issue tracker only

Definition: DQ rule failure rate 1–5%. Affects a reporting period or geographic area. Minor downstream impact.
Communication: Collibra issue tracker + email to Data Owner
Example: 45 records with negative HOUSING_STARTS in one province-month

Definition: DQ rule failure rate 5–15%. Affects CDEs. Downstream reporting may be impacted. Potential regulatory implication.
Escalate_To: CDO if not resolved within 24 hours
Communication: Collibra + email + verbal briefing to Data Owner
Example: 200+ missing HOUSING_STARTS records for a full reporting month

Definition: DQ failure rate > 15% OR CDE corruption OR data breach risk OR regulatory reporting deadline impact.
Escalate_To: Executive Leadership / CISO if breach risk
Communication: Emergency bridge call + Collibra + written incident report
Example: Full dataset load failed; all HOUSING_STARTS NULL for current month
